title: Savory Creamy Mediterranean Chicken Pilaf
description: A funky and creamy solo dinner dish featuring almond flour and Mediterranean flavors, kosher-friendly and made with a cure, perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the chicken with almond flour to coat.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat and cook the chicken until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add chicken broth, heavy cream, feta cheese, oregano, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the liquid has reduced by half, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the chicken and sauce over cooked rice or pasta, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
